description: Controlled dual-branch RGB-D fusion and DeepLabV3-ResNet50 RGB baselines trained under the fixed AeroScapes protocol.

models.name: dual_fusion_no_bottleneck
models.description: Controlled RGB-D dual-branch fusion baseline that removes the 16 x 16 x 16 semantic bottleneck while keeping comparable RGB/depth branch encoders and decoder skips.

models.name: deeplabv3_resnet50_rgb
models.description: Modern DeepLabV3-ResNet50 RGB segmentation architecture baseline, trained from scratch without external weights to preserve the fixed dataset protocol.
